title: selinum pyrenaeum
intro: Selinum pyrenaeum, also known as Pyrenean wild celery, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selinum pyrenaeum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
